project.title: Pebbles
project.description: Pebbles is an atomic diary app allowing to record memories and enrich them with emotions, instants, thoughts, related to people and get weekly and monthly wraps.

nodes.title: Landing
nodes.description: Public landing page with app branding, login button, and create-account link. Redirects authenticated users to the home view.

nodes.title: Login
nodes.description: Login page with username and password form. Redirects to path or onboarding based on profile completion status.

nodes.title: Register
nodes.description: Registration page with username, password, confirm password, and consent checkboxes (terms + privacy). Auto-logs in and redirects to onboarding on success.

nodes.title: Home
nodes.description: Main dashboard showing recent pebbles, bounce tempo, and entry points.

nodes.title: Timeline
nodes.description: Chronological feed of all recorded pebbles.

nodes.title: Record Pebble
nodes.description: Capture a new memory with title and quick context.

nodes.title: Set Intensity & Valence
nodes.description: Adjust the intensity and emotional valence of a pebble.

nodes.title: Shape Emotion Pearl
nodes.description: Sculpt a nuanced emotion pearl for the pebble.

nodes.title: Attach Instants
nodes.description: Capture or select photos to attach as instants to the pebble during recording.

nodes.title: Link Soul
nodes.description: Associate one or more souls (people) with the pebble.

nodes.title: Attach Domain
nodes.description: Map the pebble to a life domain on the revisited Maslow pyramid.

nodes.title: Add Cards & Thoughts
nodes.description: Enrich the pebble with media cards and scoped written thoughts.

nodes.title: Quick Pebble Editor
nodes.description: Single-page pebble creation editor (V2) combining all enrichment steps inline; embedded on /path and standalone on /record, with collection assignment support.

nodes.title: Pebble Detail
nodes.description: Full view of a recorded pebble with all enrichments.

nodes.title: Pebble Revelation
nodes.description: Intermediate screen after save that reveals the generated pebble SVG visual for the first time, before transitioning to celebration.

nodes.title: Record Celebration
nodes.description: Celebration screen after revelation that confirms the pebble was saved, before navigating to the detail view.

nodes.title: Collections
nodes.description: Browse and manage all pebble collections.

nodes.title: Collection Detail
nodes.description: View a collection and its pebbles grouped by month; rename / re-mode / delete entry points.

nodes.title: Create Collection
nodes.description: Create a new collection to group pebbles.

nodes.title: Edit Collection
nodes.description: Rename or re-mode an existing collection. Web renders inline on the detail page; iOS presents as a sheet.

nodes.title: Souls Directory
nodes.description: Browse and manage all souls (people in your life).

nodes.title: Soul Detail
nodes.description: View a soul's profile and all linked pebbles.

nodes.title: Add Soul
nodes.description: Create a new soul entry for someone in your life.

nodes.title: Edit Soul
nodes.description: Rename an existing soul. Web renders inline on the detail page; iOS presents as a sheet.

nodes.title: Glyphs
nodes.description: Browse all user-created glyphs (carved marks on pebble shapes).

nodes.title: Glyph Detail
nodes.description: View a single glyph with full SVG preview and metadata.

nodes.title: Carve Glyph
nodes.description: Draw a new glyph on a pebble surface using the carve editor.

nodes.title: Attach Glyph
nodes.description: Draw a new glyph or select an existing one to attach to a pebble during recording.

nodes.title: Bounce Tempo
nodes.description: View your bounce karma and regularity tempo.

nodes.title: Collection Rise
nodes.description: Track collection growth and level progression.

nodes.title: Achievements
nodes.description: Gallery of unlocked and upcoming achievements.

nodes.title: Weekly Cairn Intro
nodes.description: Introduction screen before reviewing the weekly wrap.

nodes.title: Weekly Cairn
nodes.description: Weekly wrap summarizing pebbles stacked into a cairn.

nodes.title: Weekly Cairn Review
nodes.description: Reflect on and confirm the weekly cairn.

nodes.title: Monthly Cairn Intro
nodes.description: Introduction screen before reviewing the monthly wrap.

nodes.title: Monthly Cairn
nodes.description: Monthly wrap aggregating weekly cairns into a larger cairn.

nodes.title: Monthly Cairn Review
nodes.description: Reflect on and confirm the monthly cairn.

nodes.title: Onboarding — Your life is a path
nodes.description: First onboarding screen introducing the pebble/path metaphor.

nodes.title: Onboarding — Drop a pebble, keep the moment
nodes.description: Second onboarding screen framing pebble recording as low-friction.

nodes.title: Onboarding — Qualify and relate
nodes.description: Third onboarding screen explaining emotion, domain, souls, collections.

nodes.title: Onboarding — Get your pebble
nodes.description: Fourth onboarding screen explaining glyph carving and pebble illustration.

nodes.title: Settings
nodes.description: App settings including privacy, notifications, and account.

nodes.title: Profile
nodes.description: User profile page displaying account info, appearance settings, legal document links, and logout functionality.

nodes.title: Record Pebble
nodes.description: Core flow to capture a new pebble via the single-page Quick Pebble V2 editor with all enrichments inline.

nodes.title: Onboarding
nodes.description: New user onboarding journey ending with first pebble.

nodes.title: Manage Collections
nodes.description: Browse, create, and curate pebble collections.

nodes.title: Manage Souls
nodes.description: Browse, add, and view souls linked to your pebbles.

nodes.title: Manage Glyphs
nodes.description: Browse, carve, and view glyphs (custom marks on pebble shapes).

nodes.title: Weekly Wrap
nodes.description: Weekly cairn ritual to stack and review your week.

nodes.title: Monthly Wrap
nodes.description: Monthly cairn ritual to stack weekly cairns into a bigger cairn.

nodes.title: Gamification Hub
nodes.description: Access bounce tempo, collection rise, and achievements.

nodes.title: Account
nodes.description: User account with username and hashed password credentials.

nodes.title: Profile
nodes.description: User profile with display name, onboarding state, color world preference, and consent timestamps (terms_accepted_at, privacy_accepted_at).

nodes.title: Pebble
nodes.description: A single recorded memory with intensity, 3-level positiveness, visibility, and timestamp.

nodes.title: Emotion Pearl
nodes.description: Nuanced emotional shape attached to a pebble.

nodes.title: Soul
nodes.description: A person linked to pebbles, representing someone in the user's life.

nodes.title: Domain
nodes.description: Life domain from the revisited Maslow pyramid.

nodes.title: Card
nodes.description: Media or content card attached to a pebble.

nodes.title: Thought
nodes.description: Scoped written reflection tied to a pebble.

nodes.title: Collection
nodes.description: A curated group of pebbles with rise progression.

nodes.title: Bounce
nodes.description: User's regularity karma tracking engagement tempo.

nodes.title: Cairn
nodes.description: Weekly or monthly wrap stacking pebbles into a summary.

nodes.title: Achievement
nodes.description: Unlockable reward earned through collecting and engagement.

nodes.title: Instant
nodes.description: A compressed photo attached to a pebble, stored as a base64 JPEG data URI.

nodes.title: Mark
nodes.description: A user-drawn glyph on a pebble shape, stored as SVG strokes.

nodes.title: GET /marks
nodes.description: Retrieve all user marks (glyphs).

nodes.title: POST /marks
nodes.description: Create a new mark (glyph).

nodes.title: DELETE /marks/:id
nodes.description: Delete a mark (glyph) by ID.

nodes.title: POST /pebbles
nodes.description: Create a new pebble record.

nodes.title: GET /pebbles
nodes.description: Retrieve pebbles with filters and pagination.

nodes.title: GET /pebbles/:id
nodes.description: Retrieve a single pebble with all enrichments.

nodes.title: PATCH /pebbles/:id/intensity
nodes.description: Set intensity and valence on a pebble.

nodes.title: POST /pebbles/:id/pearl
nodes.description: Shape and attach an emotion pearl to a pebble.

nodes.title: POST /pebbles/:id/souls
nodes.description: Link one or more souls to a pebble.

nodes.title: POST /pebbles/:id/domain
nodes.description: Attach a life domain to a pebble.

nodes.title: POST /pebbles/:id/cards
nodes.description: Add a media card to a pebble.

nodes.title: POST /pebbles/:id/thoughts
nodes.description: Write a scoped thought on a pebble.

nodes.title: GET /souls
nodes.description: Retrieve all souls for the current user.

nodes.title: POST /souls
nodes.description: Create a new soul entry.

nodes.title: PATCH /souls/:id
nodes.description: Rename an existing soul.

nodes.title: DELETE /souls/:id
nodes.description: Delete a soul; cascades the pebble_souls join rows. Pebbles themselves are untouched.

nodes.title: GET /collections
nodes.description: Retrieve all user collections.

nodes.title: POST /collections
nodes.description: Create a new pebble collection.

nodes.title: GET /bounce
nodes.description: Retrieve current bounce tempo and karma.

nodes.title: GET /achievements
nodes.description: Retrieve unlocked and available achievements.

nodes.title: GET /cairns/weekly
nodes.description: Generate or retrieve the current weekly cairn.

nodes.title: GET /cairns/monthly
nodes.description: Generate or retrieve the current monthly cairn.

nodes.title: POST /auth/register
nodes.description: Register a new user account.

nodes.title: POST /auth/login
nodes.description: Authenticate an existing user.

nodes.title: POST /auth/logout
nodes.description: End the current user session.

nodes.title: GET /auth/session
nodes.description: Retrieve the current session.

nodes.title: GET /profile
nodes.description: Retrieve the current user profile.

nodes.title: PATCH /profile
nodes.description: Update the current user profile.

nodes.title: GET /collections/:id/rise
nodes.description: Retrieve rise progression for a collection.

nodes.title: Mechanic Sheet
nodes.description: Informational dialog explaining a gamification mechanic (pebbles, bounce, or karma).

nodes.title: Pebble Visual
nodes.description: Reusable SVG visual component rendering a pebble's generated glyph at multiple tiers (thumbnail, detail, revelation).

nodes.title: Pebble Engine
nodes.description: Pure TypeScript rendering engine that generates SVG pebble visuals from pebble data; designed for extraction as @pebbles/engine.

nodes.title: Docs Index
nodes.description: Public documentation index listing all legal and support pages grouped by category. Supports locale switching (EN/FR) and embed mode for iOS webview.

nodes.title: Docs Page
nodes.description: Individual documentation page rendering localized markdown content (privacy policy, terms, legal notice, credits). Supports locale switching and embed mode.

nodes.title: Legal Notice
nodes.description: Individual legal notice page rendered from localized markdown. Accessible without authentication.

nodes.title: Terms of Service
nodes.description: Individual terms of service page rendered from localized markdown. Accessible without authentication.

nodes.title: Privacy Policy
nodes.description: Individual privacy policy page rendered from localized markdown. Accessible without authentication.

nodes.title: Legal Consent
nodes.description: Registration consent flow: user accepts terms and privacy policy during signup via checkboxes linking to legal documents.

nodes.title: iOS App Shell
nodes.description: Native iOS app shell initialized in PR #200. A two-tab SwiftUI TabView (Path, Profile). Email auth landed in PR #243; the Path tab now fetches the signed-in user's pebbles from Supabase and renders a reverse-chronological list (PR for #211). Profile tab is still a placeholder. Being fleshed out as feature PRs land.
